name: M1 Muzikos apdovanojimai
overview: M1 celebrates 35 years of music and on the occasion of its birthday, we invite you to an impressive music event - the national M1 Music Awards! These are awards that will combine the legendary history and present of M1, live music and the most unexpected musical duets.

trailers.title: Kam įteiktas pirmasis M1 MUZIKOS APDOVANOJIMŲ apdovanojimas?
